channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Everyone Warned Me About The Side Effects Of GLP-1s. Nobody Warned Me About The Judgment. - BuzzFeed
item.description:
1. Everyone Warned Me About The Side Effects Of GLP-1s. Nobody Warned Me About The Judgment.  BuzzFeed
  2. Using GLP-1s Made My Life Better. I Don't Care If That Bothers You.  Yahoo
  3. Obesity Should Be Treated as a Medical Emergency, Says Researcher  TecScience
  4. Opinion: Obesity medication extended my life. It’s not just about the scale.  Concord Monitor
  5. Treating Obesity is Not Optional. It is Essential Medicine  Sacramento Bee
